Subject: URGENT: Extremely disappointed with Order #48291 - Damaged Items and Poor Service

To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to express my immense frustration regarding my recent order (#48291), placed on July 5th. 

Not only did the package arrive a full week past your guaranteed delivery date, but when I finally opened it today, two of the three items I ordered were completely shattered. The box had barely any bubble wrap or protective packaging, which is frankly unacceptable for fragile goods. 

I ordered these specifically for an important event happening tomorrow, and now I am left scrambling for a last-minute replacement because of your shipping department's negligence. Furthermore, I tried calling your customer support line three times today, only to be left on hold for over 30 minutes each time before being disconnected.

I expect a full refund for this order immediately. I have attached photos of the damaged items and the inadequate packaging to this email. 

I look forward to your prompt response. If I do not hear back within 24 hours to resolve this issue, I will be forced to dispute the charge with my credit card company.

Regretfully,

Alex Mercer
alex.mercer@email.com
(555) 123-4567
